'''âj-zh-ng''' ('''jazhanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umlaut|umlaut]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umlaut|umlaut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-zh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| jazhanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhangithi|jazhangithi]] || [[word:jazhangiji|jazhangiji]] || [[word:jazhangishi|jazhangishi]] || [[word:jazhangi|jazhangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhanguthuth|jazhanguthuth]] || [[word:jazhangujuj|jazhangujuj]] || [[word:jazhangushush|jazhangushush]] || [[word:jazhang|jazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhanguthu|jazhanguthu]] || [[word:jazhanguju|jazhanguju]] || [[word:jazhangushu|jazhangushu]] || [[word:jazhangu|jazhangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhangufuth|jazhangufuth]] || [[word:jazhangufuj|jazhangufuj]] || [[word:jazhangufush|jazhangufush]] || [[word:jazhanguf|jazhanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhangethe|jazhangethe]] || [[word:jazhangeje|jazhangeje]] || [[word:jazhangeshe|jazhangeshe]] || [[word:jazhange|jazhange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhangothoth|jazhangothoth]] || [[word:jazhangojoj|jazhangojoj]] || [[word:jazhangoshosh|jazhangoshosh]] || [[word:jazhang|jazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhangotho|jazhangotho]] || [[word:jazhangojo|jazhangojo]] || [[word:jazhangosho|jazhangosho]] || [[word:jazhango|jazhango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhangofoth|jazhangofoth]] || [[word:jazhangofoj|jazhangofoj]] || [[word:jazhangofosh|jazhangofosh]] || [[word:jazhangof|jazhangof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻfĂŻf|jazhangĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻfĂŻf|jazhangĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻfĂŻf|jazhangĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻfĂŻf|jazhangĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]] || [[word:jazhangĂŻf|jazhangĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazhangĂŠthĂŠ|jazhangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jazhangĂŠjĂŠ|jazhangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jazhangĂŠshĂŠ|jazhangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jazhangĂŠ|jazhangĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazhangathath|jazhangathath]] || [[word:jazhangajaj|jazhangajaj]] || [[word:jazhangashash|jazhangashash]] || [[word:jazhang|jazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazhangatha|jazhangatha]] || [[word:jazhangaja|jazhangaja]] || [[word:jazhangasha|jazhangasha]] || [[word:jazhanga|jazhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazhangafath|jazhangafath]] || [[word:jazhangafaj|jazhangafaj]] || [[word:jazhangafash|jazhangafash]] || [[word:jazhangaf|jazhangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jazhangasha|jazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojazhangasha|gojazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijazhangasha|gokijazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jazhangnĂŒsha|jazhangnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojazhangnknĂŒsha|gojazhangnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhangnĂŒsha|gokijazhangnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jazhangshĂ«sha|jazhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojazhangnkshĂ«sha|gojazhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijazhangshĂ«sha|gokijazhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhangrosha|jazhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhangnkrosha|gojazhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhangrosha|gokijazhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhangmusha|jazhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhangnkmusha|gojazhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhangmusha|gokijazhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jazhangsherasha|jazhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojazhangnksherasha|gojazhangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijazhangsherasha|gokijazhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jazhangngasha|jazhangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojazhangnkngasha|gojazhangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijazhangngasha|gokijazhangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jazhangyasha|jazhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojazhangnkyasha|gojazhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijazhangyasha|gokijazhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jazhangyamasha|jazhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojazhangnkyamasha|gojazhangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijazhangyamasha|gokijazhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jazhangnĂŒshĂ«sha|jazhangnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojazhangnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojazhangnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijazhangnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijazhangnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhangnĂŒrosha|jazhangnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhangnknĂŒrosha|gojazhangnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhangnĂŒrosha|gokijazhangnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhangnĂŒmusha|jazhangnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhangnknĂŒmusha|gojazhangnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhangnĂŒmusha|gokijazhangnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jazhangshĂ«nĂŒsha|jazhangshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojazhangnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojazhangnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhangshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijazhangshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhangshĂ«rosha|jazhangshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhangnkshĂ«rosha|gojazhangnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhangshĂ«rosha|gokijazhangshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhangshĂ«musha|jazhangshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhangnkshĂ«musha|gojazhangnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhangshĂ«musha|gokijazhangshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jazhangronĂŒsha|jazhangronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojazhangnkronĂŒsha|gojazhangnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhangronĂŒsha|gokijazhangronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jazhangroshĂ«sha|jazhangroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojazhangnkroshĂ«sha|gojazhangnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijazhangroshĂ«sha|gokijazhangroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazhangromusha|jazhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazhangnkromusha|gojazhangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazhangromusha|gokijazhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jazhangmunĂŒsha|jazhangmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojazhangnkmunĂŒsha|gojazhangnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijazhangmunĂŒsha|gokijazhangmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jazhangmushĂ«sha|jazhangmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojazhangnkmushĂ«sha|gojazhangnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijazhangmushĂ«sha|gokijazhangmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jazhangmurosha|jazhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojazhangnkmurosha|gojazhangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijazhangmurosha|gokijazhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jazhang|jazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠzhĂŠng|jĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojazhang|hojazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠzhĂŠng|hojĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojazhang|hohojazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠzhĂŠng|hohojĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjazhang|nĂŒjazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠzhĂŠng|nĂŒjĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjazhang|nĂŒnĂŒjazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠzhĂŠng|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjazhang|nĂŻjazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠzhĂŠng|nĂŻjĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjazhang|nĂŻnĂŻjazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠzhĂŠng|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujazhang|lujazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠzhĂŠng|lujĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujazhang|lulujazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠzhĂŠng|lulujĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijazhang|lijazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠzhĂŠng|lijĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijazhang|lilijazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠzhĂŠng|lilijĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojazhang|kojazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠzhĂŠng|kojĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojazhang|kokojazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠzhĂŠng|kokojĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejazhang|kejazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠzhĂŠng|kejĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejazhang|kekejazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠzhĂŠng|kekejĂŠzhĂŠng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
